reasoning: The control IA-5(7) focuses on ensuring that authenticators are not embedded in an unencrypted static form. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that secrets are not stored in an unencrypted form and that etcd, which stores secrets, is encrypted. The functions focus on verifying that secrets are encrypted at rest and that no unencrypted static authenticators are embedded within Kubernetes secrets.
title: Authenticator Management - Authenticator management | no embedded unencrypted static authenticators ensure
